zh.Felsham, Mid Suffolk District, Suffolk,: 英國英格蘭素福爾可費爾申馬
zh.Felsham, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可費爾申馬
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Borwell於大約1540年出生在英國素福爾可費爾申馬時，她的父親Borwell11538歲，母親Mrs. Borwell11538歲。她於大約1563年1月與Adam Goodrich在英國英格蘭素福爾可費爾申馬結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1579年7月4日在英國英格蘭素福爾可費爾申馬享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可費爾申馬。

zh-hans.Felsham, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可費爾申馬
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Borwell于大约1540年出生在英国素福爾可費爾申馬时，她的父亲Borwell11538岁，母亲Mrs. Borwell11538岁。她于大约1563年1月与Adam Goodrich在英国英格兰素福爾可費爾申馬结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1579年7月4日在英国英格兰素福爾可費爾申馬享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可費爾申馬。

nameMeanings.name: Borwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Angel, Osvaldo, Alejandro, Alvaro, Blanca, Carlos, Enrique, Francisco, Jose Ramon, Julio, Luis, Manuel.

variants.name: Burrell
meanings: nickname from Middle English, Old French burel, borel (also birel) ‘reddish brown’, referring perhaps to complexion or hair color. This was occasionally used by Normans as a personal name, perhaps a nickname substituted for the personal name. The word also denoted a coarse woollen cloth of this color, so the surname may sometimes refer to dress, or it may be a nickname for a maker of the cloth, a bureller.
habitational name from Burwell in Lincolnshire, see   Burwell  .

variants.name: Borruel
meanings: Spanish: altered form of Catalan   Borrell  . Compare   Borroel   and   Burruel  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Borwell was born about 1540, in Felsham, Suffolk, England, her father, Borwell, was 11538 and her mother, Mrs. Borwell, was 11538. She married Adam Goodrich about January 1563, in Felsham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 4 July 1579, in Felsham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Felsham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Borwell est née environ 1540, à Felsham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Borwell, avait 11538 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Borwell, avait 11538 ans. Elle a épousé Adam Goodrich environ janvier 1563, à Felsham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 juillet 1579, à Felsham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Felsham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Borwell um 1540 in Felsham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Borwell 11538 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Borwell 11538. Sie hat um Januar 1563 in Felsham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Adam Goodrich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juli 1579 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Felsham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Felsham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Borwell è nata il circa 1540 nel Felsham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Borwell, aveva 11538 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Borwell, aveva 11538 anni. Lei sposato Adam Goodrich circa gennaio 1563, nel Felsham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 luglio 1579, nel Felsham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Felsham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Felsham, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクフエルシャム
ja.lifeSummary: Anne Borwellが約1540年にイギリススフォルクフエルシャムで生まれた時，父Borwellは11538歳，母Mrs. Borwellは11538歳であった。約1563年1月にイギリスイギリススフォルクフエルシャムでAdam Goodrichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1579年7月4日にイギリスイギリススフォルクフエルシャムで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクフエルシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Borwell(이)가 대략 1540년 영국 수폴크 프샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Borwell(은)는 11538세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Borwell(은)는 11538세였다. 그녀는 대략 1563년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프샤에서 Adam Goodrich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1579년 7월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프샤에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Borwell nasceu aproximadamente 1540, em Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Borwell, tinha 11538 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Borwell, tinha 11538 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam Goodrich aproximadamente janeiro de 1563, em Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de julho de 1579, em Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Borwell родилась около 1540 г. в местности фелшам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Borwell было 11538 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Borwell, 11538. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam Goodrich около январь 1563 г. в местности фелшам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 4 июля 1579 г. в местности фелшам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности фелшам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Borwell nació aproximadamente 1540, en Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Borwell, tenía 11538 años y su mamá, Mrs. Borwell, tenía 11538 años. Se casó con Adam Goodrich aproximadamente enero de 1563, en Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de julio de 1579, en Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
